description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Development cppcheck that runs on push to master, develop, and cppcheck_clang_format branches and on pull requests to master and develop. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a container with the nrel/cppcheck:2.3 image. Check out the repository, run cppcheck with specific options on the src directory, parse and colorize the results with a Python script, and upload the cppcheck results as an artifact.
